title: PostgreSQL pool exhaustion under burst traffic
author: alice
label: good
description:
API tier behind PgBouncer, transaction pooling mode

Long-lived idle txns held by a misbehaving worker
bad_example: p99 latency spikes; 'remaining connection slots reserved'
good_example: Set idle_in_transaction_session_timeout=30s and bump pool size to 2x worker count
context: API tier behind PgBouncer, transaction pooling mode
root_cause:
API tier behind PgBouncer, transaction pooling mode

Long-lived idle txns held by a misbehaving worker
symptom: p99 latency spikes; 'remaining connection slots reserved'
fix: Set idle_in_transaction_session_timeout=30s and bump pool size to 2x worker count
